title: Pet grooming launch page
prompt: I need a simple site for a neighborhood pet grooming launch. Make it feel polished, show services, before-and-after style trust points, pricing, and a clear way for people to book.

title: Outreach tracker
prompt: Build me something tiny where I can keep track of people I need to follow up with, change their status, update next contact date, and still see the saved list after I add a few.

title: Operations wallboard
prompt: Make a React wallboard for operations delays with a few KPI cards, a filter or two, recent incidents, and a quick escalation summary.

title: Snippet desk
prompt: I want a desktop workspace for saving useful snippets during support calls. Give me a sidebar, a main list, tags or filters, and an obvious add action.

title: Orders workflow API
prompt: Please make a very small backend for order workflows. I need endpoints to list orders, create one, mark one packed, and mark one shipped.

title: CSV glance CLI
prompt: Give me a command line tool I can point at a CSV file so it prints a quick glance summary like row count, columns, and header names.

title: Form guard library
prompt: Create a small reusable package with helpers for required strings, email checks, minimum length rules, and friendly validation messages I can show in forms.

title: Supplier disputes console
prompt: Create a compact admin console for supplier disputes with a saved dispute list, assignment changes, resolution status, and a quick filter by team.

title: Dispatch follow-up workspace
prompt: Build a small internal operations workspace for dispatch follow-ups. I need overdue items, owner assignment, status changes, and a visible saved list I can keep updating.

title: Shipment exceptions API
prompt: Build a tiny backend service for shipment exceptions with endpoints to list exceptions, create one, assign an owner, and mark one resolved.

title: Handoff priority CLI
prompt: Create a tiny command-line tool that reads a markdown handoff file and prints action items grouped by priority.
